Kitchen sink: every node kind and rendering policy in one app - wrapped
config loads in declaration order, init calls, selection with
branch-local config, provider and struct clusters, packed middleware and
routes, static assets, hooks, templates with a helper, typed web
handlers, and the serve handoff. The golden is
the review artifact for rendering changes.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web v0.0.0
)

replace (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates => TEMPLATEDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web => WEBDIR
)
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- shared/config.go --
package shared

//fabrik:config http
type Config struct {
	Addr string `yaml:"addr" default:":8080"`
}

//fabrik:config log
type Log struct {
	Level string `yaml:"level" default:"info"`
}

//fabrik:init
func InitLogger(l *Log) error { return nil }
-- shared/http.go --
package shared

import "net/http"

type Server struct {
	Config *Config
}

//fabrik:http:server
func (s *Server) Serve(h http.Handler) error {
	return http.ListenAndServe(s.Config.Addr, h)
}
-- shared/middleware.go --
package shared

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http:middleware
func Recovered(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http:middleware name=auth
func RequireAuth(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }
-- store/store.go --
package store

import "context"

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
}

//fabrik:config postgres
type PostgresConfig struct {
	DSN string `yaml:"dsn"`
}

//fabrik:provider:select store.kind
type Store interface {
	Get(key string) string
}

type Memory struct{}

func (*Memory) Get(key string) string { return key }

//fabrik:provider case=memory
func NewMemory(c *Config) *Memory { return &Memory{} }

type Postgres struct{}

func (*Postgres) Get(key string) string { return key }

//fabrik:provider case=postgres
func NewPostgres(ctx context.Context, c *PostgresConfig) (*Postgres, error) { return &Postgres{}, nil }

type Pool struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewPool(ctx context.Context) (*Pool, error) { return &Pool{}, nil }
-- web/assets.go --
package web

import "embed"

//fabrik:http:static /assets dir=assets
//go:embed assets
var Assets embed.FS
-- web/assets/style.css --
body {}
-- web/templates.go --
package web

import (
	"embed"
	"strings"
)

//fabrik:templates
//go:embed all:templates
var Templates embed.FS

//fabrik:templates:func
func Shout(s string) string { return strings.ToUpper(s) }
-- web/templates/_default/_layout.html --
<html>{{ block "content" . }}{{ end }}</html>
-- web/templates/_default/home.html --
{{ define "content" }}{{ shout "hi" }}{{ end }}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/store"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"
	weblib "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web"
)

//fabrik:http:group /api middleware=auth
type API struct {
	Store     store.Store
	Pool      *store.Pool
	Templates *templates.Set
}

//fabrik:http GET /items/{id}
func (a *API) Item(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http POST /items
func (a *API) Create(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:handle /metrics
func Metrics() http.Handler { return http.NotFoundHandler() }

//fabrik:web GET /api/items.json
func (a *API) ItemsJSON(req *weblib.Request) (weblib.Response, error) {
	return weblib.JSON{Value: []string{"a"}}, nil
}

//fabrik:http:notfound
func Missing(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"io/fs"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"
	web2 "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/web"

	"app/shared"
	"app/store"
	"app/web"
)

func run() error {
	// Config
	sharedConfig, err := config.Load[shared.Config](
		config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
		config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"),
		config.KnownSections("http", "log", "postgres", "store"),
		config.Section("http"),
	)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	sharedLog, err := config.Load[shared.Log](
		config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
		config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"),
		config.KnownSections("http", "log", "postgres", "store"),
		config.Section("log"),
	)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	storeConfig, err := config.Load[store.Config](
		config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
		config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"),
		config.KnownSections("http", "log", "postgres", "store"),
		config.Section("store"),
	)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	// Init
	if err := shared.InitLogger(sharedLog); err != nil {
		return err
	}

	ctx := context.Background()

	// Providers
	// store.Store, selected by store.kind
	var storeStore store.Store
	switch storeConfig.Kind {
	case "memory":
		storeStore = store.NewMemory(storeConfig)
	case "postgres":
		storePostgresConfig, err := config.Load[store.PostgresConfig](
			config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
			config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"),
			config.KnownSections("http", "log", "postgres", "store"),
			config.Section("postgres"),
		)
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
		storeStorePostgres, err := store.NewPostgres(ctx, storePostgresConfig)
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
		storeStore = storeStorePostgres
	default:
		return fmt.Errorf("no store.Store implementation for %q", storeConfig.Kind)
	}
	storePool, err := store.NewPool(ctx)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	webTemplates, err := templates.Load(web.Templates, "templates", templates.FuncMap{
		"shout": web.Shout,
	})
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	webAPI := &web.API{
		Store:     storeStore,
		Pool:      storePool,
		Templates: webTemplates,
	}
	adapter := web2.NewAdapter(web2.WithRenderer(webTemplates))

	// embedded Assets, served under /assets
	webAssets, err := fs.Sub(web.Assets, "assets")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	r := router.New()

	sharedServer := &shared.Server{
		Config: sharedConfig,
	}

	// Middleware
	r.Use(shared.Recovered)

	// Routes
	r.Handle("/assets/", http.StripPrefix("/assets", http.FileServerFS(webAssets)))
	r.Method("GET", "/api/items/{id}", webAPI.Item, shared.RequireAuth)
	r.Method("POST", "/api/items", webAPI.Create, shared.RequireAuth)
	r.Handle("/metrics", web.Metrics())
	r.Method("GET", "/api/api/items.json", adapter.Wrap(webAPI.ItemsJSON), shared.RequireAuth)
	r.NotFound(web.Missing)

	// Serve
	return sharedServer.Serve(r)
}
